title: osmundastrum cinnamomeum var. glandulosum
intro: Osmundastrum cinnamomeum var. glandulosum, also known as the glandular cinnamon fern, is a type of fern native to North America. The medicinal properties of Osmundastrum cinnamomeum var. glandulosum include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, relieving congestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory conditions. Osmundastrum cinnamomeum var. glandulosum is traditionally used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
